Ntc Of Mo For Order Compelling Ans To Written Interrogs & Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Judgment Creditor Pacific Bell Directory's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Judgment Debtor's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Judgment Debtor is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $315, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order, and Turnover Order, and Order To Appear On A Weekly Basis is granted. No opposition has been filed. Any weekly appearances shall be noticed for Room 633 at 2:15 p.m.
